title: Web search router — Brave → Tavily → DuckDuckGo with SQLite cache
what_failed: web_search used only DuckDuckGo with no fallback and no caching. Repeated queries hit the network every time.
fix_applied: tools/tools_web.py: WebTools.web_search() now routes Brave (BRAVE_API_KEY) → Tavily (TAVILY_API_KEY) → DuckDuckGo (always-on). SQLite cache at data/web_cache.db keyed on (provider, query, max_results) with 1h TTL. Provider name returned in result for observability. DuckDuckGo HTML parser preserved as final fallback.
